title: FAKIR: Foundational Architecture for Knowledge, Intelligence & Reasoning (UKOP kernel)
description: Kernel of the Universal Knowledge Operating Platform (UKOP). v0.6: the FAKIR lattice is a true point cloud after ilm.codes/explore - all 9,350 leaf x layer points individually scattered (deterministic per-point jitter on angle, radius and height inside the shell) and individually floating, with the AGI stack as a single labelled vertical axis (no rings). Seeding is three-dimensional: AGI layer (L0-L9, Project ILM) x domain (UN ISIC Rev.4 / ILO ISCO-08 / UNESCO ISCED-F 2013 - 1,505 nodes) x language (every ISO 15924 script and ISO 639-3 language, live from the ilm.codes registries), then built via the AAB process (VGC doi:10.5281/zenodo.21264248). The page IS the zistgah.org landing file (9 marked seams); flight now holds altitude by default with gravity as a settings toggle (7 marked FLIGHT-MODs); .nojekyll added so GitHub Pages serves the root file raw. Headless-executed via jsdom (boot, seams, tree, search, registries, cloud scatter, float, flight hold/sink). Poster corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21436552.
notes: (c) 1993-2026 Abhishek Choudhary. All rights reserved. AI model: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic). DOI injected post-mint; no fabrication.
